sigWerErrors.reason: 'el agente' (the agent) vs 'la gente' (the people) changes the subject from a specific agent to people in general, which alters the meaning of the sentence significantly.
The insertion of 'una' before 'para el aumento' is a minor grammatical error and does not change the overall meaning of the sentence.
Changing 'el limite de la tarjeta' (the card limit) to 'mi limite de la tarjeta' (my card limit) personalizes the statement but does not significantly alter the intent or meaning.
